examples: His hair was flecked with paint.
The fabric was red, flecked with gold.
His hair was increasingly flecked with grey.
Strands of black tagliatelle were flecked with succulent peekytoe crab and sweet cubanella peppers.
In "The Tomb, " a prison-escape thriller, Mr. Schwarzenegger sports gray-flecked hair and a matching goatee.
